item.name: Cait Sith Doll
item.description:
The ever-extended tail helps the kitten keep his balance.

Use item to acquire the Cait Sith doll minion.
item.tooltip:
What may be a few to
you was everything to
those who died...
  - Cait Sith
item.specialactiondescription: Grants 10 action points to all allies within range who do not have similar actions.
